entity.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency exchange providing spot markets, perpetual futures, unified-margin trading, wallet and account services, buy-crypto access, market data, and authenticated REST and WebSocket APIs.
entity.notes: Current first-party website exposes spot trading, perpetual futures, unified margin, wallet, KYC, buy-crypto, API, signup, and login flows. Current market pages list perpetual instruments with prices and 24-hour volumes, while first-party developer documentation covers spot and derivatives order, account, market-data, REST, and WebSocket APIs.

evidence.title: Globe Exchange official platform
evidence.notes: Current first-party homepage exposes Spot, Perpetuals, Unified Margin, Buy Crypto, Wallet, KYC, Earn, API, signup, and login functionality and identifies the service as a cryptocurrency exchange.

evidence.title: Globe perpetual markets
evidence.notes: Current first-party market page lists active perpetual instruments with prices, price changes, 24-hour volumes, and direct trade actions while also exposing Spot and Perpetual market navigation.

evidence.title: Globe Exchange API documentation
evidence.notes: Current first-party developer documentation covers authenticated REST and WebSocket APIs, balances, orders, trades, market data, order books, spot instruments, derivatives instruments, and exchange rate limits.
